channel.title: Nick Spears - Robtics Software Developer
channel.description: Recent content on Nick Spears - Robtics Software Developer

item.description: Nick Spears Goals subtext Background subtext
“/content/home/subheader.md” how to link to parts of page: you text me text.

item.title: Blog Post 1
item.description:
/content/home/services/service3.md

I don’t think they tried to market it to the billionaire, spelunking, base-jumping crowd. i did the same thing to gandhi, he didn’t eat for three weeks. i once heard a wise man say there are no perfect men.
